# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Deployment or CI

## Checks

- [ ] `python -m ruff check .`
- [ ] `python -m pytest`
- [ ] `python -m agentic_grant_proposal_builder.evaluation`
- [ ] `python scripts/smoke_streamlit.py`

## AI And Safety Review

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] No private grant documents committed
- [ ] No private applicant data committed
- [ ] No claim of guaranteed eligibility, compliance, award likelihood, or funder acceptance
- [ ] Human review boundary preserved

## Notes

Add screenshots, logs, or reviewer notes as needed.
